category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a stateful tail utility for showing file changes since last check.
source_facts.executables lists a command-line executable named since.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the upstream project page and is the best official documentation surface found for this small utility.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive points to a Debian orig tarball, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies stateful tail behavior for file changes.
